items.title: Mother of Alexei Navalny says poison finding confirms he was murdered
items.dek: On the second anniversary of his death, Lyudmila Navalnaya says her son did not "simply die in prison".
items.body: On the second anniversary of his death, Lyudmila Navalnaya says her son did not "simply die in prison".

items.title: Pressure grows for release of remaining Venezuelan political prisoners
items.dek: An NGO says hundreds of people remain behind bars despite US pressure US to speed up their release.
